text:
BOTTOM LINE — Tech-led rally, semis exploded, energy ignored Iran noise. Intel Q1 beat sparked Semi 7 +7.29%, QQQ +1.91% topped amid protection buying. Flows accumulated XLK vol up, positioning showed fear via SPY PCR 1.14.

INDICES — VIX 18.7 down from 21.6 MA20. QQQ +1.91%, SPY +0.77%, IWM +0.41%, IJR +0.54%, DIA -0.16%. Large > small by 1.37pp. Treasuries IEF +0.20% notable.

VOLUME — Elevated: IJR 1.1x, XLU 1.1x, XLK 0.9x gaining attention. Declining: IWM 0.6x, XLY 0.6x ignored. SPY vol_ratio implicit accumulation (price up), QQQ 0.8x low-conviction rally.

SECTORS — XLK Technology +2.81%, XLY Discretionary +0.81%, XLB Materials +0.21%, XLU Utilities +0.20%, XLE Energy -0.19%, XLRE Real Estate -0.30%, XLP Staples -0.30%, XLF Financials -0.73%, XLI Industrials -0.92%, XLV Healthcare -1.41%, XLC Comms -1.58%. Top industries RSPN -0.83%, MSOS +10.90%; bottom USO -1.72%, IYZ -2.77%.

THE 7s — Top5: Semi +7.29% (QCOM +11.12% strongest, TXN -1.80% weakest), Fab +4.11%, Software +3.39%, Mag +1.97%, Old Metals +1.50%. Bot5: Defense -2.47% (LMT -3.08% weakest, strongest unnamed), Health -1.37%, Freight -1.18%, Medtech -1.08%, Industrial -0.82%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, CME hold 100%. Stance Hawk6 (Cook, Hammack et al), Neutral5 (Powell), Dove4 (Bowman). USD stress 57/100 Elevated, Reserve Scarcity 97th percentile most-stressed; TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.14 elevated protection, skew +3.8% fear; spot 706 near GEX_flip 720. QQQ PCR_vol 1.60 higher fear, skew +6.2%. VIX 18.7 below MA20 complacency.

CROSS-ASSET — Semis +7% decoupled from oil -1.72% despite Hormuz blockades. Gold +0.51% rose vs dollar -0.18% on risk hedge.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 55.3 Neutral. Top movers INTC +23.60% Semi7, QCOM +11.12% Semi7, AMD +13.91% Semi7. 20d momentum XLK +20.92% best sector, Semi +48.82% best basket; XLE -7.56% worst sector, Defense -7.47% worst. Vol spikes INTC 2.5x +23.60% accumulation, QCOM 3.0x +11.12% accumulation tied to Intel earnings.

WATCH — INTC +23.60% vol 2.5x post-earnings momentum break. QCOM +11.12% Semi7 strongest vol 3.0x gamma near flip. RSPN -0.83% 32.8x vol spike EW industrials divergence.
